name: finding-unknowns
description: Nine skills for surfacing unknown unknowns before, during, and after implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Surface unknown unknowns before they get expensive
interface.longDescription: An orchestrator plus eight phase skills for blind-spot discovery, prototypes, interviews, reference hunting, planning, implementation notes, review packaging, and merge quizzes.
defaultPrompt: Help me surface the unknown unknowns in this task.
Run a blind-spot pass before I implement this.
Package what we learned for review.
